research.title: How Qualys ETM Identity Detects Identity-Based Attacks Faster
research.summary: Key Takeaways Identity-based attacks are among the fastest and most effective intrusion methods because valid credentials let attackers operate as trusted users. Techniques like Pass-the-Hash, Kerberoasting, Domain Controller Synchronization (DCSync), and.
